title: Vanilla Ascended+
description: This is another version of my Vanilla Ascended modpack but including a few extra features that are only in 1.20.1
body:
# **Vanilla Ascended+ 1.20.1**

This is the 1.20.1 version of my modpack with a few extra features.

This modpack is for people who want to play vanilla minecraft but still want mods to make it feel, sound and look better.

Vanilla ascended is a modpack made to have whenever you play vanilla minecraft that adds visual and audible effects without adding extra content that changes the gameplay.
